name: [PD-1] Создать новый сервер с правильными данными (Кейс-1)
fullName: [PD-1] Создать новый сервер с правильными данными (Кейс-1)

steps.name: assert expected **{ Object (success, data, ...) }** to have property **data**
assert expected **{ Object (accessToken, expiresAt) }** to have property **accessToken**
assert expected **<h2.font-sub-heading.mb-0>** to have text **Виртуальные серверы**
assert expected **<h2.font-sub-heading.mb-0>** to have text **Новый сервер**
assert expected **{ Object (error, errMessage, ...) }** to have property **data**

parameters.name: actual
parameters.value:
{
  "error": 0,
  "errMessage": null,
  "data": {
    "id": "YC1766656825",
    "vmName": "TS-With-Backup",
    "status": "STATUS_NEW",
    "cpuCores": 2,
    "ram": 4,
    "localDiskSize": 10,
    "osName": "Debian 12",
    "localIp": "192.168.100.1",
    "diskType": "HDD",
    "disks": [
      {
        "id": null,
        "name": "scsi0",
        "size": 10,
        "diskType": "HDD",
        "boot": true
      }
    ],
    "nets": [],
    "password": "pf#tDOeQB0xJ53U",
    "user": "root",
    "hasSSH": false,
    "blocked": true,
    "sshAvail": true,
    "passAvail": false,
    "userNetId": 254,
    "isQemuAgentActive": false
  }
}
